z>SIGTERM should shut down the server whether daemonized or not.

z test_case_name: "test_SIGTERM_2"N)

zAunsubsig: True
test_case_name: "test_signal_handler_unsubscribe"
list
openZ	error_log)
Z	log_linesr
test_signal_handler_unsubscribe
z3SignalHandlingTests.test_signal_handler_unsubscribeN)
    Wait on INADDR_ANY should not raise IOError
    In cases where the loopback interface does not exist, CherryPy cannot
    effectively determine if a port binding to INADDR_ANY was effected.
    In this situation, CherryPy should assume that it failed to detect
    the binding (not that the binding failed) and only warn that it could
    not verify it.
    z
0.0.0.0z-Unable to verify that the server is bound on )
matchr
find_available_local_portr"
process
serversrd
warns
UserWarningZ
_safe_waitr:
raises
IOError)
Z	free_portr

warningsr
